)

  CASE

示例1 SQL: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

示例2 SQL: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'view') AS view_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'add_cart') AS add_cart_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders) AS order_users

few_shot_examples.question: 用户复购率（下单2次及以上的用户占比）
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AS repeat_users) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders), 4) AS metric_value

few_shot_examples.question: 商品评价的评分分布
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT rating AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating
